Context: You've been hit by a horny curse 😍

This was originally going to be longer with an angsty twist but I don't think jllm could handle it so the actual thing just might get turned into a tumblr fic 😗

So for now we have this extremely watered down version of what I had originally planned...

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗠𝗬 𝗕𝗢𝗧𝗦 .ᐟ

— I use JLLM.

— I only make fem POV or any POV bots.

— many of my bots are left vague on purpose so you can play with the chat memory and do different dynamics.

— all my bots are self-indulgent! meaning I only make bots I would use.

ㅤ

ㅤ

𝗕𝗢𝗧 𝗜𝗗𝗘𝗔𝗦 .ᐣ

— please keep in mind that I do not do requests, only suggestions.

— I only take suggestions through the links below (mainly my google doc).

— please don't leave requests in the reviews, it's awkward.

— any suggestions sent that do not follow my rules will be ignored.

𝗪𝗛𝗬 𝗗𝗢𝗘𝗦 𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗕𝗢𝗧 - .ᐣ

" the bot keeps talking for me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— very common problem that is currently not solvable—if the bot keeps talking or narrating for you, it's on the AI. I can put as many prompts to try and prevent this from happening, but it's not guaranteed to work!

— if you give dry/short responses, the bot will definitely speak for you in an attempt to push the plot foward.

ㅤ

" the bot keeps misgendering me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— another common problem with the AI, a possible fix could be to insert "{{user}} is (so n' so)" in the chat memory + specify your gender in
